name: Tide Display
author: ChuckBuilds
description: Coastal tide display with animated wave level, tide schedule, 24-hour chart, and tidal statistics. Powered by the free NOAA Tides & Currents API (US stations, no API key required).

versions.notes: Readability overhaul: reduce water fill cap to 18% (thin strip, maximum sky for text), wave amplitude reduced ~35%, 1px drop shadow on current-mode text labels, chart axis labels properly centered and clamped to display edges, stats cycle-% label moved above bar to prevent bottom clip.

Fix text invisible on hardware: assign display_manager.image before rendering so draw_text() targets the correct canvas. Replace bare PIL draw.text() calls with display-font helpers. Brighten dim colours (C_DIM, C_GRID, C_LABEL, C_BAR_OUT). Use configured tide_color/highlight_color in water and chart rendering. Increase schedule bar height.
